title: Functional Characterization of 4 Universal 4-Node Motifs (IDs 77, 80, 82, 83): 3→4 Embedding, Layer Ordering, and Semantic Roles
summary: Demo notebook analyzing 4 universal 4-node motif types (IDs 77, 80, 82, 83) from LLM attribution graphs. Loads pre-computed per-graph results (24 graphs across 8 domains), builds canonical motif patterns with igraph, analyzes FFL containment, layer span ordering vs random baselines (Mann-Whitney U), cross-domain consistency (Kruskal-Wallis, Cramer's V), and builds a motif family taxonomy with cosine similarity. Visualizes results in a 4-panel figure: FFL containment bars, layer span comparison, stacked domain counts, and similarity heatmap.
